productDisplayName: Wills Lifestyle Men Blue & Green T-Shirt
description: Style Notewills lifestyle are here to provide sartorial solutions for all the different areas of your life - whether you're at the office, relaxing at home or heading out to party. For those relaxing days off when you want to look your casual best, choose a polo T-shirt from Wills Sport. Crafted with the label's best yarn, keep your off-duty composition original with this classic staple. Wear it with corduroy trousers, casual shoes and an understated beltProduct DetailsGreen, blue, black and white striped polo neck T-shirt, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, chest buttoned placket and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash separately using a mild detergentDo not bleachDrip dryWarm ironSize and FitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
